title: FIRST FINANCIAL ANNOUNCES BOARD ELECTION AND INCREASED DIVIDEND AT ANNUAL MEETING
author: Prnewswire
description: First Financial Bankshares announced an increase in its quarterly cash dividend and the election of its board of directors at the annual shareholders' meeting.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company announced an increase in its quarterly cash dividend, which is generally seen as a positive sign for shareholders.

title: Stephens raises First Financial Bankshares stock PT by $5 on strong Q2 results - Investing.com
author: Ismeta Mujdragic
description: Stephens has increased the price target for First Financial Bankshares to $36 from $31, maintaining an Equal Weight rating on the stock. The bank's strong Q2 performance, including robust loan growth and favorable outlook, led to the upward revision.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The bank's strong Q2 performance, including 16% loan growth and favorable outlook, led Stephens to raise the price target, indicating a positive sentiment.
